title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・オブテイン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, I'm in the middle of preparing ice
packs for Biwa Hayahide when I hear her behind
me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well? How did I look today?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I agree. I feel so much stronger after summer—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
N-nothing. I'm fine. Absolutely everything is all
right.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I wanted to win this race so badly, and my
legs didn't let me down.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It was nothing like how they failed me before, just
when I needed to run a little faster...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I wonder if I can catch up to her now...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly why we've been working so hard on
my winning equation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: So I can finally beat Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are two more months until the Arima Kinen.
Only a short while remains until it's time for the
long-awaited sibling showdown.
